High-touch AI counsel for women carrying consequential decisions.

Executive AI Counsel

Private advisory for founders, executives, and board leaders who need a trusted technical and strategic sounding board.

Power Briefings

Board and C-suite briefings that make AI strategy feel clear, financially literate, and leader-owned.

Enterprise AI Positioning

A narrative and roadmap that connects AI investments to market position, operating leverage, risk posture, and customer trust.

Discretion

A private room for sensitive decisions.

Precision

Focused recommendations, not decks for the sake of decks.

Presence

Language that helps you lead with authority.

Dark, elegant, unapologetically executive.
